scripts.copy-assets: powershell -Command "Copy-Item -Path public\favicon.ico, public\logo-kabah.svg, public\apple-touch-icon.png, public\icon-*.png, public\og-image.jpg -Destination dist\ -Force; Copy-Item -Path public\assets\* -Destination dist\assets\ -Force -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host 'Assets copied to dist/'"
